TEXT.citation: Rau, D. V., & Dong, M. N. (2006). Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary. Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{rau2006yami, title={Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary}, author={Rau, D Victoria and Dong, Maa-Neu}, year={2006}, publisher={Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica}}
TEXT.source: ['4. man’acing so kois', '圈豬腳', 'Tying up pigs', '', 'si apen Kotan/Jinovoy (M, 75, Yayo)', '王仁德，男，75，椰油村', '']

S.FORM: ratateng am, mina ka-doa araw namen a ni-mi-walam a,
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, mina ka-ɖo~ua araw namən a ni-mi-walam a,
S.FORM: ratateng am, mina kadoa araw namen a nimiwalam a,
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, mina kaɖo~ua aɻaw namən a nimiwalam a,
S.TRANSL: 後來我們放了兩天的假
After this we had two days of vacation.

S.FORM: ratateng am, "a ta mi-walam, mo ke-hakay a, mi ta man-'acing so korang" koan ko si apen Sidongen a, "nohon"
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, "a ta mi-walam, mo~u kə-ʁakaj a, mi ta man-ʔaciŋ ʂo~u ko~uraŋ" ko~uan ko~u ʂi apən ʂiɖo~uŋən a, "no~uʁo~un"
S.FORM: ratateng am, "a ta miwalam, mo kehakay a, mi ta man'acing so korang" koan ko si apen Sidongen a, "nohon"
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, "a ta miwalam, mo~u kəɰakaj a, mi ta manʔaʨiŋ ʂo~u ko~uɻaŋ" ko~uan ko~u ɕi apən ɕiɖo~uŋən a, "no~uɰo~un"
S.TRANSL: 我跟我的朋友si apen Sidongen說＂今天放假，不如我們拿繩子去絆豬玩＂ ，他說＂好啊＂
"Today is vacation, so why don't we go tie the pigs up?" I asked my friend si apen Sidongen. "Sure," he replied.

S.FORM: "imo rana, mo ke-hakay am,", sira ka nira apen Mangananao ito, aka da mina Ngapas a, aro sira o ka-raray ko a,
S.PHON: "imo~u rana, mo~u kə-ʁakaj am,", ʂira ka nira apən maŋananao~u ito~u, aka ɖa mina ŋapaʂ a, aro~u ʂira o~u ka-raraj ko~u a,
S.FORM: "imo rana, mo kehakay am,", sira ka nira apen Mangananao ito, aka da mina Ngapas a, aro sira o kararay ko a,
S.PHON: "imo~u ɻana, mo~u kəɰakaj am,", ɕiɻa ka niɻa apən maŋananao~u ito~u, aka ɖa mina ŋapaʂ a, aɻo~u ɕiɻa o~u kaɻaɻaj ko~u a,
S.TRANSL: 我對si apen Sidongen說，＂你呢， ＂,當時還有其它的同伴如si apen Mangananao、si Ngapas等，我們好幾個同學。
At the time my friends were si apen Mangananao, si Ngapas, and some others. "What about you," I asked.

S.FORM: "toyo-en nio do 'a-'acing ko a pinan-an ko", ji ko ni-pinan-an a, to ko i pa-kedked-a do lima ko a,
S.PHON: "to~ujo~u-ən nio~u ɖo~u ʔa-ʔaciŋ ko~u a pinan-an ko~u", ʥi ko~u ni-pinan-an a, to~u ko~u i pa-kəɖkəɖ-a ɖo~u lima ko~u a,
S.FORM: "toyoen nio do 'a'acing ko a pinanan ko", ji ko nipinanan a, to ko i pakedkeda do lima ko a,
S.PHON: "to~ujo~uən nio~u ɖo~u ʔaʔaʨiŋ ko~u a pinanan ko~u", ʥi ko~u nipinanan a, to~u ko~u i pakəɖkəɖa ɖo~u lima ko~u a,
S.TRANSL: ＂你們把豬趕到我的陷阱（繩）中，我則拿著繩子的另一端＂ ，實際上我不是拿繩子，而是綁在手上
"You chase the pig to where my rope is and I'll hold the other end." Actually I tied it around my wrist.

S.FORM: to da noyo-a am, to na novoz-a no rako a aviik a, a ni-m-alam ko pa do ma-k-alan a wakay a,
S.PHON: to~u ɖa no~ujo~u-a am, to~u na no~uvo~uʐ-a no~u rako~u a aviik a, a ni-m-alam ko~u pa ɖo~u ma-k-alan a wakaj a,
S.FORM: to da noyoa am, to na novoza no rako a aviik a, a nimalam ko pa do makalan a wakay a,
S.PHON: to~u ɖa no~ujo~ua am, to~u na no~ufo~uɻa no~u ɻako~u a afiik a, a nimalam ko~u pa ɖo~u makalan a wakaj a,
S.TRANSL: 他們把豬趕過來之後，公豬就跳下去，起先我只是被拖走了大約一個地瓜田的 距離
After they had started to chase the pigs, the hog jumped down. I got dragged about the distance of a sweet potato field.

S.FORM: k-om-zas rana sira o aro a korang am, maci-ka-kezas o rako a aviik o ni-'acing ko a,
S.PHON: k-o~um-ʐaʂ rana ʂira o~u aro~u a ko~uraŋ am, maci-ka-kəʐaʂ o~u rako~u a aviik o~u ni-ʔaciŋ ko~u a,
S.FORM: komzas rana sira o aro a korang am, macikakezas o rako a aviik o ni'acing ko a,
S.PHON: ko~umɻaʂ ɻana ɕiɻa o~u aɻo~u a ko~uɻaŋ am, maʨikakəɻaʂ o~u ɻako~u a afiik o~u niʔaʨiŋ ko~u a,
S.TRANSL: 後來其它的母豬因受到驚嚇，它們一跑，跟我綁在一起的公豬也跟著緊張
Since the hog jumped, his squealing frightened the sows, and this made the hog I was tied to nervous.

S.FORM: to na malipasíp-an yaken am, ka-teng-an ko pa, to na ma-nila-cilamón-an yaken do ka-ango-an a,
S.PHON: to~u na malipaʂ*p-an jakən am, ka-təŋ-an ko~u pa, to~u na ma-nila-cilam*n-an jakən ɖo~u ka-aŋo~u-an a,
S.FORM: to na malipasipan yaken am, katengan ko pa, to na manilacilamonan yaken do kaangoan a,
S.PHON: to~u na malipaɕipan jakən am, katəŋan ko~u pa, to~u na manilaʨilamo~unan jakən ɖo~u kaaŋo~uan a,
S.TRANSL: 它拖著我穿梭在林投樹叢下奔竄，拖的我暈頭轉向
The hog started running, dragging me through the pandanus bushes, and I didn't even know what was happening anymore.

W.TRANSL: 虛.動綴-疊-鑽來鑽去-工焦.虛

S.FORM: am-ian do ni-limot da do tey-laod no ili a vahay no kois da am, todey andep am,
S.PHON: am-ian ɖo~u ni-limo~ut ɖa ɖo~u təj-lao~uɖ no~u ili a vaʁaj no~u ko~uiʂ ɖa am, to~uɖəj anɖəp am,
S.FORM: amian do nilimot da do teylaod no ili a vahay no kois da am, todey andep am,
S.PHON: amian ɖo~u nilimo~ut ɖa ɖo~u təjlao~uɖ no~u ili a faɰaj no~u ko~uiʂ ɖa am, to~uɖəj anɖəp am,
S.TRANSL: 公豬一直跑到村莊下緣的一個豬檻，就往那裡跑進去
The hog kept running to the pigsty below the village, and there the hog jumped down.

S.FORM: am to na lipet-an am, to-da zavat am, o ri o ji ko rana ni-maci-lolo-i do korang a.
S.PHON: am to~u na lipət-an am, to~u-ɖa ʐavat am, o~u ri o~u ʥi ko~u rana ni-maci-lo~ulo~u-i ɖo~u ko~uraŋ a.
S.FORM: am to na lipetan am, toda zavat am, o ri o ji ko rana nimaciloloi do korang a.
S.PHON: am to~u na lipətan am, to~uɖa ɻafat am, o~u ɻi o~u ʥi ko~u ɻana nimaʨilo~ulo~ui ɖo~u ko~uɻaŋ a.
S.TRANSL: 後來牠又轉了個彎，結果把我跟牠相連的繩子弄斷了，終於擺拖了母豬拖拉的苦難
He passed the fence and turned, and then the rope snapped. Finally the pig wasn't dragging me around.

S.FORM: ratateng am, aong-en da yaken no ka-raray ko am, ta ikong pa o m-ian, ni-micia-sazi-sazikodkod jiaken,
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, ao~uŋ-ən ɖa jakən no~u ka-raraj ko~u am, ta iko~uŋ pa o~u m-ian, ni-micia-ʂaʐi-ʂaʐiko~uɖko~uɖ ʥiakən,
S.FORM: ratateng am, aongen da yaken no kararay ko am, ta ikong pa o mian, nimiciasazisazikodkod jiaken,
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, ao~uŋən ɖa jakən no~u kaɻaɻaj ko~u am, ta iko~uŋ pa o~u mian, nimiʨiaʂaɻiʂaɻiko~uɖko~uɖ ʥiakən,
S.TRANSL: 後來我的同伴們都趕過來看我。啊呀，我身上哪裡還有完好之處？全身到處都是刮傷
My friends all came to look for me. There wasn't a place on my body that wasn't scraped up.

W.TRANSL: 過去-主焦.到處都是-疊-刮傷

S.FORM: a mi-ka-doa do oo ko o ni-ma-tokas a, akma ko rana i ni-gagay no takzes a,
S.PHON: a mi-ka-ɖo~ua ɖo~u o~uo~u ko~u o~u ni-ma-to~ukaʂ a, akma ko~u rana i ni-gagaj no~u takʐəʂ a,
S.FORM: a mikadoa do oo ko o nimatokas a, akma ko rana i nigagay no takzes a,
S.PHON: a mikaɖo~ua ɖo~u o~uo~u ko~u o~u nimato~ukaʂ a, akma ko~u ɻana i nigagaj no~u takɻəʂ a,
S.TRANSL: 我頭上有兩處被撞到流血的，我全身像被刀切割的一樣
There were two places on my head that looked like I had been in a knife fight, and the blood would not stop flowing.

S.FORM: alak-en da rana yaken a hap-en do vahay namen a.
S.PHON: alak-ən ɖa rana jakən a ʁap-ən ɖo~u vaʁaj namən a.
S.FORM: alaken da rana yaken a hapen do vahay namen a.
S.PHON: alakən ɖa ɻana jakən a ɰapən ɖo~u faɰaj namən a.
S.TRANSL: 我的同伴們就扶著我回家去了
I was taken home in this fashion.

S.FORM: "ya ni-ma-kongo ya, síno ya na ni-paci-liman-an ya? manga koinio" koan da,
S.PHON: "ja ni-ma-ko~uŋo~u ja, ʂ*no~u ja na ni-paci-liman-an ja? maŋa ko~uinio~u" ko~uan ɖa,
S.FORM: "ya nimakongo ya, sino ya na nipacilimanan ya? manga koinio" koan da,
S.PHON: "ja nimako~uŋo~u ja, ɕino~u ja na nipaʨilimanan ja? maŋa ko~uinio~u" ko~uan ɖa,
S.TRANSL: 他們說＂喂，他怎麼了？跟誰打架了？＂
"What happened? Who did he fight with?" they asked.

S.FORM: "kena, man-'acing ta so korang koan na am, namen to noyo-a, ya na ni-lolo no korang a,
S.PHON: "kəna, man-ʔaciŋ ta ʂo~u ko~uraŋ ko~uan na am, namən to~u no~ujo~u-a, ja na ni-lo~ulo~u no~u ko~uraŋ a,
S.FORM: "kena, man'acing ta so korang koan na am, namen to noyoa, ya na nilolo no korang a,
S.PHON: "kəna, manʔaʨiŋ ta ʂo~u ko~uɻaŋ ko~uan na am, namən to~u no~ujo~ua, ja na nilo~ulo~u no~u ko~uɻaŋ a,
S.TRANSL: ＂他沒跟誰打架。他只是叫我們一起去絆豬，我們就把豬趕過去，然後他就這樣被豬拖走的
"He didn't fight. He suggested that we go tie up pigs. We only started to chase the pigs, and he got dragged away.

S.FORM: ya na ka-miney-cia-sazi-sazingodngod a m-in-a'ari no taga-tagaw si ke-hakay a"
S.PHON: ja na ka-minəj-cia-ʂaʐi-ʂaʐiŋo~uɖŋo~uɖ a m-in-aʔari no~u taga-tagaw ʂi kə-ʁakaj a"
S.FORM: ya na kamineyciasazisazingodngod a mina'ari no tagatagaw si kehakay a"
S.PHON: ja na kaminəjʨiaʂaɻiʂaɻiŋo~uɖŋo~uɖ a minaʔaɻi no~u tagatagaw ɕi kəɰakaj a"
S.TRANSL: 只不過被碎玻璃之類的東西刮傷及割傷而已＂
He just got scraped up by glass and metal. That's all."

W.TRANSL: 只是-曾經-到處都是-疊-刮傷

S.FORM: tang! ka-tenng-an pa an, mi-ci-cia-miying sira ori a, "ori o apia do ji mi-wey-walam",
S.PHON: taŋ! ka-tənŋ-an pa an, mi-ci-cia-mijiŋ ʂira o~uri a, "o~uri o~u apia ɖo~u ʥi mi-wəj-walam",
S.FORM: tang! katenngan pa an, miciciamiying sira ori a, "ori o apia do ji miweywalam",
S.PHON: taŋ! katənŋan pa an, miʨiʨiamijiŋ ɕiɻa o~uɻi a, "o~uɻi o~u apia ɖo~u ʥi miwəjwalam",
S.TRANSL: 喝！哪知他們反而哈哈大笑，說＂好啊！活該嘛，誰叫他閒不住喲＂
Hey, who would guess that they actually started laughing and saying, "All right! It serves him right. He's the one who just cannot stop moving."

S.FORM: ka-pandan ko rana do dang a, ratateng am, y-angay da rana yaken do vahay namen a.
S.PHON: ka-panɖan ko~u rana ɖo~u ɖaŋ a, ratatəŋ am, j-aŋaj ɖa rana jakən ɖo~u vaʁaj namən a.
S.FORM: kapandan ko rana do dang a, ratateng am, yangay da rana yaken do vahay namen a.
S.PHON: kapanɖan ko~u ɻana ɖo~u ɖaŋ a, ɻatatəŋ am, jaŋaj ɖa ɻana jakən ɖo~u faɰaj namən a.
S.TRANSL: 當時，我真的痛到了極點。後來他們就送我回家去
At the time, I was already hurting very badly. They took me home.

S.FORM: m-oli sira Ina icialaw aka ni Ama icialaw am, "a ya ni-ma-kongo si ke-hakay nio a, nio k-ai do vahay namen?"
S.PHON: m-o~uli ʂira ina icialaw aka ni ama icialaw am, "a ja ni-ma-ko~uŋo~u ʂi kə-ʁakaj nio~u a, nio~u k-ai ɖo~u vaʁaj namən?"
S.FORM: moli sira Ina icialaw aka ni Ama icialaw am, "a ya nimakongo si kehakay nio a, nio kai do vahay namen?"
S.PHON: mo~uli ɕiɻa ina iʨialaw aka ni ama iʨialaw am, "a ja nimako~uŋo~u ɕi kəɰakaj nio~u a, nio~u kai ɖo~u faɰaj namən?"
S.TRANSL: 我的父母親從山上回來，看見我的同伴們，就問說＂你們的朋友怎麼了？你們為什麼來我們家？＂
My parents came back from the mountains and saw my friends, so they asked, "What happened to your friend? Why is everyone in our home?"

S.FORM: "a ya m-ian so na ka-pi-ápi-an ni ke-hakay a, ya ni-mika-sazi-sazingodngod a ya ni-micia-'ari-'ari so kataotao",
S.PHON: "a ja m-ian ʂo~u na ka-pi-*pi-an ni kə-ʁakaj a, ja ni-mika-ʂaʐi-ʂaʐiŋo~uɖŋo~uɖ a ja ni-micia-ʔari-ʔari ʂo~u katao~utao~u",
S.FORM: "a ya mian so na kapiapian ni kehakay a, ya nimikasazisazingodngod a ya nimicia'ari'ari so kataotao",
S.PHON: "a ja mian ʂo~u na kapiapian ni kəɰakaj a, ja nimikaʂaɻiʂaɻiŋo~uɖŋo~uɖ a ja nimiʨiaʔaɻiʔaɻi ʂo~u katao~utao~u",
S.TRANSL: ＂我們的朋友傷得體無完膚，遍體鱗傷＂
"Our friend is maimed, and his body is full of cuts."

S.FORM: ta ikong o anga-ngáy-an ko a adaday a loi-loit ko, ta ni-rios da yaken no ka-raray ko?
S.PHON: ta iko~uŋ o~u aŋa-ŋ*j-an ko~u a aɖaɖaj a lo~ui-lo~uit ko~u, ta ni-rio~uʂ ɖa jakən no~u ka-raraj ko~u?
S.FORM: ta ikong o angangayan ko a adaday a loiloit ko, ta nirios da yaken no kararay ko?
S.PHON: ta iko~uŋ o~u aŋaŋajan ko~u a aɖaɖaj a lo~uilo~uit ko~u, ta niɻio~uʂ ɖa jakən no~u kaɻaɻaj ko~u?
S.TRANSL: 當時我何止是體無完膚，還一身的髒兮兮呢，我的同伴們也不幫我洗澡
At the time I was completely covered with cuts and bruises and I was filthy, but my friends didn't help me get a bath.

S.FORM: ratateng am, arios-en na rana yaken ni Ama icialaw am, ta ni-micia-'ai-'ait o siko-siko ko am, siri-siri ko am, ata-atang ko a,
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, ario~uʂ-ən na rana jakən ni ama icialaw am, ta ni-micia-ʔai-ʔait o~u ʂiko~u-ʂiko~u ko~u am, ʂiri-ʂiri ko~u am, ata-ataŋ ko~u a,
S.FORM: ratateng am, ariosen na rana yaken ni Ama icialaw am, ta nimicia'ai'ait o sikosiko ko am, sirisiri ko am, ataatang ko a,
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, aɻio~uʂən na ɻana jakən ni ama iʨialaw am, ta nimiʨiaʔaiʔait o~u ɕiko~uɕiko~u ko~u am, ɕiɻiɕiɻi ko~u am, ataataŋ ko~u a,
S.TRANSL: 後來還是我父親幫我洗的澡。因為我的手肘，身體兩側，屁股等到處都是割傷
At the end my father helped me wash. My arms, both sides of my body, and my bottom were all full of cuts.

W.TRANSL: 過去-主焦.到處都是-疊-割傷

S.FORM: ta no t-om-iknoz ko am, ba ba ba ba koan ko a.
S.PHON: ta no~u t-o~um-ikno~uʐ ko~u am, ba ba ba ba ko~uan ko~u a.
S.FORM: ta no tomiknoz ko am, ba ba ba ba koan ko a.
S.PHON: ta no~u to~umikno~uɻ ko~u am, ba ba ba ba ko~uan ko~u a.
S.TRANSL: 每遇前有障礙物，我都閃避不及的撞個啪啦啪啦響
Every time there was something in the way, I would go pop pop pop (run into and break the objects).

S.FORM: to da a-cita yamen no ma-naod so tawaz a sira do ma-lavong a ma-naod so tawaz am,
S.PHON: to~u ɖa a-cita jamən no~u ma-nao~uɖ ʂo~u tawaʐ a ʂira ɖo~u ma-lavo~uŋ a ma-nao~uɖ ʂo~u tawaʐ am,
S.FORM: to da acita yamen no manaod so tawaz a sira do malavong a manaod so tawaz am,
S.PHON: to~u ɖa aʨita jamən no~u manao~uɖ ʂo~u tawaɻ a ɕiɻa ɖo~u malafo~uŋ a manao~uɖ ʂo~u tawaɻ am,
S.TRANSL: 路過某處，被正在編織魚網的sira do malavong漁團看見了
We passed a place where the sira do malavong fishing organization was just weaving nets.

S.FORM: ya ji a-pia si ke-hakay a, ya ji á-ni-ma-vaci o ai-ai na am, lima-lima na,
S.PHON: ja ʥi a-pia ʂi kə-ʁakaj a, ja ʥi *-ni-ma-vaci o~u ai-ai na am, lima-lima na,
S.FORM: ya ji apia si kehakay a, ya ji animavaci o aiai na am, limalima na,
S.PHON: ja ʥi apia ɕi kəɰakaj a, ja ʥi animafaʨi o~u aiai na am, limalima na,
S.TRANSL: 我們的朋友，他還好啦，他沒有斷手斷腳啦
But he's alright. His arms and legs aren't broken yet.

S.FORM: "tang ang!" "a imo pa sio, mo pi-aavoada a ji mi-walam, apia o akma sang?",
S.PHON: "taŋ aŋ!" "a imo~u pa ʂio~u, mo~u pi-aavo~uaɖa a ʥi mi-walam, apia o~u akma ʂaŋ?",
S.FORM: "tang ang!" "a imo pa sio, mo piaavoada a ji miwalam, apia o akma sang?",
S.PHON: "taŋ aŋ!" "a imo~u pa ɕio~u, mo~u piaafo~uaɖa a ʥi miwalam, apia o~u akma ʂaŋ?",
S.TRANSL: ＂為什麼？＂ ＂你怎麼老是閒不住呢，你看你像什麼樣子？＂
"Why?" "Jeez, why can't you just cool down? Look what you've done to yourself."

S.FORM: ratateng am, ka-pang-za da jiaken so asa ka pinareng do dang do ni-pan-nngan-nngan ko a.
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, ka-paŋ-ʐa ɖa ʥiakən ʂo~u aʂa ka pinarəŋ ɖo~u ɖaŋ ɖo~u ni-pan-nŋan-nŋan ko~u a.
S.FORM: ratateng am, kapangza da jiaken so asa ka pinareng do dang do nipannngannngan ko a.
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, kapaŋɻa ɖa ʥiakən ʂo~u aʂa ka pinaɻəŋ ɖo~u ɖaŋ ɖo~u nipannŋannŋan ko~u a.
S.TRANSL: 後來我父母親就宰殺一隻羊，為我受重傷的事給我壓壓驚
My parents killed a goat afterwards in order to help me recover from my shock.

W.TRANSL: 過去.受焦-動綴-疊-受重傷
